achievements.title: Health Plans
achievements.description: Complete the level "Secret Plans" without dying. (For these achievements, non-cosmetic extras are not allowed except for Use Old Save and using ghost characters are not permitted. The achievements also have to be done in either Story Mode or Free Play.)
